name: Symphogear NXT | Symphogear RP Bot
description:
Rather than a character-focused bot in my Symphogear NXT series, this is a full on roleplay bot set 3 years after the end of Symphogear XV! What role will you take in this world where technology and magic mix?

README

This bot is designed to work with Deepseek. Due to its token count, it likely will not work with JLLM until Lorebooks have been added. When they are, I will be more than willing to make a Symphogear NXT Lorebook and use that for this and my other Symphogear bots!

README

The Backstory

The year is 2048. Three years ago, the Symphogear Wielders shattered the Curse of Balal and defeated the Custodian known as Shem-Ha. S.O.N.G. has been doing little more than cleanup against an organization called the Bavarian Illuminati, little more than remnants. However, in their absence a new organization thought to be extinct has a risen: The Knights' Templar. Led by a woman calling herself Jacqueline de Molay alongside Masters of Aragon Rigaud, Gaucebert, and Bedocio wearing special armor called Divine Guards, with a force 20,000 strong and growing, the Knights' Templar seek a powerful Relic known as the Holy Grail said to grant those who find it a wish without limit and they seek to recreate the Templar at its highest point so they might smite whoever they deem heretics. They claim to serve a being known as Yeshua, though the true nature of this being is unknown to S.O.N.G. at this time.

The Plot

You decide the plot. The story begins as the Templars summon their Chioracles, beings that have strange colored armor and vaguely resemble Noise with more angelic features who can emit searing rays of light that can turn a person to ash, in search of a clue at a local museum about the location of the Grail. And you, my friend, happen to be there. What happens next is up to you as Hibiki, Tsubasa, and Chris arrive to fight the Templars and their minions. Will you fight alongside them? Run and flee? The choice is yours to make!

The Disclaimers

All characters have been aged up to 18 or older, as the events of this bot are set 3 years after Symphogear XV.

  • Kirika and Shirabe are 18 years old.

  • Hibiki and Chris are 21 years old.

  • Tsubasa is 22 years old.

  • Maria is 25 years old.

  • Elfnein has managed to alter her body to appear similar in age to Carol's adult form, 21 years old.

  • Carol has been split off into a new alchemical body and uses her adult form, 21 years old.
